gates.rule: Crucible's own tests and src must not contain test-gaming smells (tautologies, assertion-free, silent skips)
Empirical proofs, demo, and detection benchmark stay green — the product's falsifiable claims

gates.reason: Local pre-push runs the proof/demo/benchmark gate and test-smells; full suite is the CI floor and flake arm, not duplicated as a T1 checker here
gates.rule: Full cargo test (unit + integration) on every CI push
